reviews.review_description: The games kinda mid like I like it it's old gtag but it lacks players usually I see a few people and there mods it has free long arms but the game is a bit buggy random barriers certain features don't work but I respect the devs they do their best with keeping the game safe I decided to say I was gonna mod the game as a joke so now I'm perma banned but there is awesome mods I'm friends with some of em if there was a bigger amount of people a little more bug fixes and updates it would be the best

I’m gonna be 100% honest all there is are staff flying around and bragging about staff I’m FREINDS with cobe the owner but I have to do way to much to get it even tho I have known him for 3-4 years of my life over all it’s OK you should try it but it might make you mad or sad because the staff think there goddess and 100% ignore you.

Gorilla Swimmers is one of the best games on the Horizon Store because it delivers a unique twist on movement-based VR gameplay, letting players swim, race, and explore with smooth, intuitive mechanics. Its vibrant aquatic environments and fun physics make every match feel lively and replayable. The community-driven features and constant updates keep the game fresh, giving players tons of reasons to come back. Overall, it stands out as a top-tier VR experience that combines creativity, competition, and pure fun.
